info.name: NearProp - Seller/Developer/Property Advisor Unified
info.description: Unified API collection for Seller, Developer, and Property Advisor roles in the NearProp application

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Register a new user account. After registration, you'll need to verify with OTP and then request seller role.
Verify user with OTP sent during registration
Login with a seller account. The auth token will be automatically set for subsequent requests.
Request to be assigned the SELLER role. An admin will need to approve this request.
Request to be assigned the DEVELOPER role. An admin will need to approve this request.
Request to be assigned the ADVISOR role. An admin will need to approve this request.
Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

item.description: Endpoints for authentication and user management

}

request.description: Create a new property listing. The property ID will be automatically set for subsequent requests.

formdata.value: A beautiful 3BHK apartment with modern amenities and great views

request.description: Create a new property listing with images and video using form data

formdata.value: An updated beautiful 3BHK apartment with modern amenities

request.description: Update an existing property with new images and video using form data
Delete a property listing
Activate a property listing with a subscription. The property will be visible until the expiry date.
Get all properties owned by the authenticated user
Search for properties with various filters
Get a list of all districts where properties are available
Get a list of all states where properties are available
Get a list of districts in a specific state
Get all visits for properties owned by the authenticated seller

exec: console.log("No visits found or failed to set visit ID");

request.description: Get all visits for a specific property. The visit ID will be set for subsequent requests if visits are found.
Get details of a specific visit
Update the status of a visit (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)
Get all visits with a specific status (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)
Check availability for property visits within a date range
Upload a new reel for a property. The reel ID will be set for subsequent requests.
Get details of a specific reel
Update a reel's metadata
Delete a reel
Get all reels created by the authenticated user
Get all reels for a specific property
Check if more reels can be uploaded for a specific property

exec: console.log("Chat Room ID set to: " + jsonData[0].id);
console.log("No chat rooms found or failed to set chat room ID");

request.description: Get all chat rooms for a specific property. The chat room ID will be set for subsequent requests if rooms are found.
Get details of a specific chat room
Get messages in a specific chat room
Send a message in a chat room
Add a participant to a chat room
Close a chat room
Reopen a closed chat room
Get all chat rooms that the authenticated user is participating in
Get analytics data for a specific property within a date range
Get analytics data for a specific reel within a date range
Get analytics data for visits to a specific property within a date range
Get analytics data for all properties owned by the authenticated user within a date range
Get analytics data for all reels created by the authenticated user within a date range
Get analytics data for subscriptions of the authenticated user within a date range
Get all available subscription plans
Get subscription plans by type (PROPERTY, REEL, etc.)
Create a new subscription. The subscription ID will be set for subsequent requests.
Get details of a specific subscription
Get all subscriptions for the authenticated user
Cancel a subscription
Renew a subscription
Check if the user can add more properties based on subscription limits
